title: [Epic] Stabilize FormContainer Rendering & E2E Permissions
body: Fixing the empty rendering of Guest FormContainers caused by paginated object definition retrieval limitations, and resolving 404 data fetching errors for advanced-object-data Map Pins.

issues.title: Fix Paginated Retrieval of Object Definitions in Setup
issues.body: The `/o/object-admin/v1.0/object-definitions` endpoint defaults to 10 items or a single page of results. With 85+ custom objects, the `APPLICANT` object is skipped. This causes the FormContainer wrapper class lookup to fallback to an invalid hardcoded ID, resulting in silent API failures where 18+ Form Fragments render as completely empty pages. We must loop through all pagination pages in `site.js`.

issues.title: Grant Guest View Permissions for MAP_PIN Object
issues.body: The `MAP_PIN` object ERC was missing from the `dynamicERCs` list in `permissions.js`. Because `data-grid-inline-editing` does not have a `test-data.json`, its default `MAP_PIN` requirement wasn't automatically discovered, causing Data Grid tests to fail with a 404 Fetch error. We need to explicitly add `MAP_PIN` to the Guest permissions whitelist.
